Documentation for the Python implementation of the PULSEv2 protocol suite.

# Purpose
The `pebble.pulse2` file provides a brief description of the `pulse2` module, which is a Python implementation of the PULSEv2 protocol suite. It includes a link to the documentation for the PULSEv2 protocol suite hosted on the Pebble Technology wiki.
